subject: NS Tender Review: RFP-MCC-2608 - Maccan Wastewater Treatment Plant System Assessment Report (closes 2026-06-16)
body:
Jay,

A Nova Scotia tender has been flagged as a consultant-fit opportunity and is ready for document review.

Action required
High priority: download the tender package and complete go/no-go review.

Opportunity summary
Tender ID: RFP-MCC-2608
Opportunity: Maccan Wastewater Treatment Plant System Assessment Report
Client / procurement entity: Municipality of the County of Cumberland
Closing date: 2026-06-16
Bid fit: Prime consultant fit
Classification: Looks like a consulting, design, study, assessment, or engineering-services opportunity.
Portal: https://procurement-portal.novascotia.ca/tenders/RFP-MCC-2608
Tracker: https://www.notion.so/3734df31b17680d5a260ff090665cc7c

Decision checks
- Confirm the full scope and deliverables from the tender documents.
- Check mandatory meetings, addenda, submission method, insurance, bonding, and schedule.
- Confirm evaluation criteria, required forms, pricing format, and document download requirements.
- Assign an internal go/no-go owner and proposal lead before starting a response.

Open questions to resolve
- Confirm whether the public notice scope matches the tender documents.
- Confirm internal go/no-go owner and proposal lead.

Known risks / notes
- Verify scope, submission method, insurance, schedule, mandatory meetings, and evaluation criteria from tender documents.
- Public notice only: do not treat scope, submission rules, or eligibility as confirmed until the tender package is opened.
- Staffing names from the current proposal-agent roster are demo data; do not use them as real assignments.

Next update
- Update the Notion tracker after document download and go/no-go review.
- If pursuing, replace demo staffing data before drafting team assignments.

Local reference files
- Brief: C:\Users\jpate\Proposal-Agents-\proposals\active\ns-tenders\rfp-mcc-2608-maccan-wastewater-treatment-plant-system-assessment-report.yaml
- Analysis: C:\Users\jpate\Proposal-Agents-\proposals\outputs\ns-tenders\rfp-mcc-2608-maccan-wastewater-treatment-plant-system-assessment-report-analysis.md
